summary: Frontend testing for new 'Product Sub-Selection in Bulk Category Editor' feature. All 7 required features verified working correctly through UI testing.

issues: 500 error on /api/historical-sales/manual-entries endpoint (not related to this feature)

1_product_selection_panel_appears.evidence: Product Selection panel appears with amber border and package icon when products are selected in Bulk Category Editor

2_shows_list_of_products_with_checkboxes.evidence: Panel shows list of all selected products with checkboxes for sub-selection, product names, SKUs, and thumbnails

3_search_functionality.evidence: Search input 'Search products by name or SKU...' filters the product list correctly

4_all_and_none_buttons.evidence: 'All' and 'None' buttons visible and functional for bulk sub-selection

5_selected_and_default_badges.evidence: Ticked products show 'Selected' badge (amber), unticked products show 'Default' badge (gray outline)

6_dual_api_calls_logic.evidence: Code at lines 2160-2258 in SupplierProducts.js correctly implements: when Material selected (non-Porcelain) and sub-selection exists, API called twice - once for sub-selected with chosen material, once for others with Porcelain default

7_apply_button_shows_success.evidence: Apply button shows product count and toast.success message shows update counts for both groups

code_review_summary.bulk_category_editor_integration: Line 5940-5941: productSubSelection and setProductSubSelection correctly passed to BulkCategoryEditorSections
code_review_summary.ui_component: BulkCategoryEditorSections.jsx lines 271-413 implements Product Selection panel with all required UI elements
code_review_summary.sub_selection_logic: Lines 2160-2258 in SupplierProducts.js correctly handles dual API calls when sub-selection exists with non-default material

critical_code_review_comments: Feature implementation is complete and correct
Help text in UI clearly explains the feature behavior
Summary line '0 will get selected value, 3 will get default (Porcelain)' provides good user feedback
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product Sub-Selection feature in Bulk Category Editor is fully implemented and working. The feature allows granular attribute assignment - sub-selected products get the chosen value while others get the default (Porcelain for Material). UI testing confirmed all panels, buttons, search, and badges work correctly.
test_flow_used: 4. Click 'Edit Categories' button to open Bulk Category Editor modal
5. Verify Product Selection panel appears showing selected products count
7. Verify product list with checkboxes, search input, All/None buttons
8. Test sub-selection by clicking on products - verify Selected/Default badges
9. Scroll to Specifications section and expand Material dropdown
11. Verify Apply button shows correct count
